- Clicking on the RIGHT/BOTTOM U-shape in a double container: restores the shape

- Right U-shape (node 14): restored right half, moved red dot right

- Bottom-left cross (52,10): This is below and to the left of the yellow container. Maybe it means "move the yellow red dot down"?
